SEARCH

Module org.bluezoo.json

module org.bluezoo.json
JSON parser and serializer module.

Provides a streaming, event-driven JSON parser and writer that operates in constant memory. The parser uses a push model where bytes are fed via JSONParser.receive(java.nio.ByteBuffer) and events are delivered via JSONContentHandler.

See Also:
  • JSONParser
  • JSONWriter

  • Packages

    Exports
    Package
    Description
    org.bluezoo.json
    A compact, efficient JSON parsing and serialization library for Java.
